title: Fix structure select causing 'Wide Op' error

features.name: packed struct assignment to indexed struct member array
features.description: Code should include a packed struct assigned to an indexed element of a struct member array, where the struct member is itself an array of packed structs

features.name: dynamic indexing into unpacked array of structs with array members
features.description: Code should include dynamic indexing into an unpacked array of structs where the struct contains an array of packed structs, accessed via task parameters
